prompt:
A bin of fine, clump-free compost after screening, shown as dark, crumbly soil-like material with a uniform texture. A metal mesh sifter rests nearby with a small pile of larger leftover bits off to the side, clearly indicating the compost was shaken through a screen and is now ready for seedlings or top-dressing.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future solarpunk garden/workbench aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic soil granularity, no logos, and no readable text. Keep the screened compost as the focal subject, clean and non-gross.
